metadata.title: Best Practices | Andrea Losavio
metadata.description: See why this portfolio scores 100/100 on Google Lighthouse. Explore the engineering excellence, accessibility standards, and code quality behind every page.

hero.title: Built with <highlight>obsessive</highlight> attention to detail
hero.subtitle: This website isn't just a portfolio — it's a proof of engineering excellence. Every pixel, every interaction, every line of code follows the highest industry standards.

scores.title: Lighthouse <highlight>perfect scores</highlight>
scores.subtitle: Measured with Google Lighthouse, the industry standard for web quality auditing.

practices.title: What makes this site <highlight>stand out</highlight>
practices.subtitle: A breakdown of the engineering principles and standards applied throughout the entire codebase.

items.item3: Screen reader optimized with ARIA labels
items.item5: Skip links for quick content access

items.item1: Semantic markup with proper heading hierarchy
items.item5: Structured data and Open Graph tags

items.item1: HTTPS enforced across the entire site

items.item2: Modern stack: Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind CSS v4
items.item3: Clean architecture with clear separation of concerns
items.item4: ESLint + Prettier for consistent code style
items.item6: No any types — fully typed codebase

items.item1: Fully responsive: mobile, tablet, and desktop
items.item2: Dark mode native — designed for it, not adapted

cta.title: Want the same <highlight>quality</highlight> for your project?
cta.subtitle: I build digital products with the same obsessive care you've seen on this site. Let's talk about your vision.
